title: Neon Void Runner
description: A fast-paced endless runner with stunning neon cyberpunk visuals. Navigate through a glowing digital void, dodge obstacles, and survive as long as you can. Speed increases over time — how far can you go?

maker.name: KouziTech
maker.bio: KouziTech is an AI-first game studio pushing the boundaries of generative AI in game development. Every game is designed, built, and polished using AI-assisted workflows — proving that high-quality games can be created faster than ever before. We specialize in HTML5 browser games that work everywhere: no downloads, no installations, no plugins. Just click and play.

instructions: Control your neon ship through an endless void. Dodge glowing obstacles and collect power-ups. The longer you survive, the faster it gets. Use arrow keys or WASD to move left and right. Press Space to start and P to pause. Challenge yourself to beat your high score!
